$comment: Scoop manifest for QiloBack — Windows package manager support. Lives here as a template; the canonical copy is hosted in the delixon-labs/scoop-bucket repository (or directly in this repo's gh-pages branch, depending on hosting choice). Placeholders 0.3.8 and 5b8931be2cfd2ccd6d06355b7616fb1cf9e133340e4a7e608552702aab5fd0c3 are replaced by the release-cli-binary workflow on tag push.
description: Backend manufacturer — DSL → FastAPI + PostgreSQL generator.
